requested_items.objective: Run a 7B-class native checkpoint ablation ladder to isolate the precision loss source in the mixed/int8 softmax-recip attention path.

expected_result.reason: The prior native quality gate held the mixed/int8 latency frontier; this ablation determines which approximation should be redesigned or relaxed next.
